survey.name: opd
survey.label: Enter OPD Number
survey.constraint_message: OPD Number Must be Less Than 9 Digits

survey.name: age
survey.label: Age in years
survey.constraint_message: Age Must be Less Than 3 Digits

survey.name: phone
survey.label: Phone Number
survey.constraint_message: Phone Number Must be Exactly 10 numbers

survey.name: chw
survey.label: How do you know about PEC ?

survey.name: FamilyHis
survey.label: Have you Family history of Glucoma ?

survey.name: GlucomaSusRE
survey.label: Is Patients Right Eye Glucoma Suspected ?

survey.name: GlucomaSusLE
survey.label: Is Patients Left Eye Glucoma Suspected ?

survey.name: Vision
survey.label: How much difficulty do you have in vision(even after wearing glasses)?

survey.name: Hearing
survey.label: How much difficulty do you have in Hearing(even after using hearing aids)?

survey.name: Walking
survey.label: How much difficulty do you have in Walking or climbing steps?

survey.name: Remember
survey.label: How much difficulty do you have in Remembering or concentrating?

survey.name: SelfCare
survey.label: How much difficulty do you have with self-care such as washing all over or dressing?

survey.name: ComCation
survey.label: Using usual language, how much difficulty do you have in communication, for example understanding or being understood?

survey.name: error1
survey.label: Please correct error
survey.hint: You fill new patient with PMT details

survey.name: bcvaCh1
survey.label: PVA Right Eye can't be better than BCVA Right Eye

survey.name: bcvaCh2
survey.label: PVA Left Eye can't be better than BCVA Left Eye

survey.name: LowVisionPat
survey.label: This is a Low Vision Patient need to referred for low vision follow up
survey.relevant: (${bcva1}=5 or ${bcva1}=6 or ${bcva1}=7 or ${bcva1}=8 or ${bcva1}=9 or ${bcva1}=10 or ${bcva1}=11 or ${bcva1}=12 or ${bcva1}=13 or ${bcva1}=14 or ${bcva1}=15 or ${bcva1}=16 or ${bcva1}=17 or ${bcva1}=18) and (${bcva2}=5 or ${bcva2}=6 or ${bcva2}=7 or ${bcva2}=8 or ${bcva2}=9 or ${bcva2}=10 or ${bcva2}=11 or ${bcva2}=12 or ${bcva2}=13 or ${bcva2}=14 or ${bcva2}=15 or ${bcva2}=16 or ${bcva2}=17 or ${bcva2}=18)
